_instructions: Master resume in structured format. The Tailor agent reads this and assembles tailored versions per job, selecting relevant experience, skills, and metrics.
summary: Technical leader with 10+ years driving SaaS platform adoption, API integration, and customer success. Proven ability to build high-performing teams, deliver complex technical solutions, and drive measurable business impact through process optimization and client relationship management.

experience.title: Lead Solutions Engineer
highlights: Led onboarding and integration initiatives for key accounts
Achieved zero churn rate from integration implementations
Managed Tier 1 and Tier 2 technical delivery
Redesigned onboarding processes to improve efficiency and client success rates

experience.title: Technical Account Manager
highlights: Delivered 100% implementation success rate across all B2B migrations
Developed and maintained REST API integrations for enterprise clients
Led successful B2B platform migration affecting 50+ accounts

experience.title: Technical Support Engineer
highlights: Managed Tier 2 technical support with 89% first-contact satisfaction rate
Trained and mentored 7 engineers on technical fundamentals and customer communication
Developed fraud detection mechanisms protecting $300K+ in transactions
Optimized support workflows, improving operational efficiency by 10-15%
Reduced mean-time-to-resolution by 20% through process improvements

growth: Zero churn rate from integration implementations

tailoring_notes.backend_engineer_emphasis: Emphasize technical depth in API design, Python/SQL skills, infrastructure knowledge, and problem-solving capability
tailoring_notes.platform_engineer_emphasis: Highlight SaaS architecture expertise, process optimization, infrastructure tooling experience, and mentoring capability
tailoring_notes.technical_leader_emphasis: Focus on team leadership, mentoring, process improvement, and customer success at scale
tailoring_notes.solutions_engineer_emphasis: Emphasize integration expertise, API development, customer collaboration, 100% success rate delivery
